'''lolazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulture|vulture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulture|vulture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lolazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolazhithi|lolazhithi]] || [[word:lolazhiji|lolazhiji]] || [[word:lolazhishi|lolazhishi]] || [[word:lolazhiki|lolazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolazhuthu|lolazhuthu]] || [[word:lolazhuju|lolazhuju]] || [[word:lolazhushu|lolazhushu]] || [[word:lolazhuku|lolazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolazhuthu|lolazhuthu]] || [[word:lolazhuju|lolazhuju]] || [[word:lolazhushu|lolazhushu]] || [[word:lolazhuku|lolazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolazhufthuf|lolazhufthuf]] || [[word:lolazhufjuf|lolazhufjuf]] || [[word:lolazhufshuf|lolazhufshuf]] || [[word:lolazhufkuf|lolazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolazhethe|lolazhethe]] || [[word:lolazheje|lolazheje]] || [[word:lolazheshe|lolazheshe]] || [[word:lolazheke|lolazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolazhotho|lolazhotho]] || [[word:lolazhojo|lolazhojo]] || [[word:lolazhosho|lolazhosho]] || [[word:lolazhoko|lolazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolazhotho|lolazhotho]] || [[word:lolazhojo|lolazhojo]] || [[word:lolazhosho|lolazhosho]] || [[word:lolazhoko|lolazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolazhofthof|lolazhofthof]] || [[word:lolazhofjof|lolazhofjof]] || [[word:lolazhofshof|lolazhofshof]] || [[word:lolazhofkof|lolazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf|lolazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolazhĂŠthĂŠ|lolazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lolazhĂŠjĂŠ|lolazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lolazhĂŠshĂŠ|lolazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lolazhĂŠkĂŠ|lolazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolazhatha|lolazhatha]] || [[word:lolazhaja|lolazhaja]] || [[word:lolazhasha|lolazhasha]] || [[word:lolazhaka|lolazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolazhatha|lolazhatha]] || [[word:lolazhaja|lolazhaja]] || [[word:lolazhasha|lolazhasha]] || [[word:lolazhaka|lolazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolazhafthaf|lolazhafthaf]] || [[word:lolazhafjaf|lolazhafjaf]] || [[word:lolazhafshaf|lolazhafshaf]] || [[word:lolazhafkaf|lolazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lolazhasha|lolazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolazhshĂ«asha|lolazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolazhroasha|lolazhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolazhmuasha|lolazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolazhyaasha|lolazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololazhnkshĂ«asha|gololazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololazhnkroasha|gololazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololazhnkmuasha|gololazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololazhnkyaasha|gololazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lolalazhasha|lolalazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolalazhshĂ«asha|lolalazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolalazhroasha|lolalazhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolalazhmuasha|lolalazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolalazhyaasha|lolalazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololalazhnkshĂ«asha|gololalazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololalazhnkroasha|gololalazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololalazhnkmuasha|gololalazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololalazhnkyaasha|gololalazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lelĂŠzhasha|lelĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lelĂŠzhshĂ«asha|lelĂŠzhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lelĂŠzhroasha|lelĂŠzhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lelĂŠzhmuasha|lelĂŠzhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lelĂŠzhyaasha|lelĂŠzhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golelĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha|golelĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golelĂŠzhnkroasha|golelĂŠzhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golelĂŠzhnkmuasha|golelĂŠzhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golelĂŠzhnkyaasha|golelĂŠzhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lolfazhasha|lolfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolfazhshĂ«asha|lolfazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolfazhroasha|lolfazhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolfazhmuasha|lolfazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolfazhyaasha|lolfazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololfazhnkshĂ«asha|gololfazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololfazhnkroasha|gololfazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololfazhnkmuasha|gololfazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololfazhnkyaasha|gololfazhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
